payload.character_role: an expert tea sommelier and wellness educator specializing in the biochemical and cultural dimensions of green tea relaxation rituals

story.logline: An expert tea sommelier guides viewers through the immersive ritual of green tea preparation, revealing its rich cultural heritage and the science behind its powerful antioxidants and relaxation benefits, highlighting why mastering green tea relaxation is essential for holistic wellness.
clip_beats: Introduction to the cultural heritage of green tea ceremonies in East Asia, emphasizing ritualistic mindfulness and sensory engagement
Deep dive into the biochemical properties of green tea, focusing on L-theanine and EGCG antioxidants that facilitate mental calmness and physiological relaxation
Exploration of the comprehensive health benefits, including stress hormone regulation, enhanced neuroprotection, and cardiovascular support, underscoring green tea's role in holistic wellness
